intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease. In addition, it has the ability to provide Quality Score feedback.
target_condition: Left ventricular dysfunction, including normal global LV systolic function, dilated LV, left ventricular hypertrophy, coronary artery disease
ground_truth: Manual measurements by two sonographers; correlation and agreement analysis using bias and limits of agreement
other_metrics: Correlation r=0.79 vs average manual measurements of two sonographers for Fractional Shortening; 82% automatic analysis success rate (99/121 exams); 90% automatic analysis success rate in additional dataset (36/40 exams)
